commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 3. "Sing unto Him a new song:" sing unto Him a song of the grace of faith. "Sing skilfully unto Him with jubilation" (ver. 3): sing skillfully unto Him with rejoicing.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
New. Interesting, like the canticle of the lamb, or of redemption, Apocalypse. Public worship and music are very useful, when performed with attention. (Berthier)
The prophet invites all to praise God for the blessings granted by Christ in the new law. (Worthington)
Noise, proceeding from the heart, the cry of which alone penetrates heaven. (Haydock)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
